title: Contact | Keir Mather MP
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Keir Mather MP top of page Keir Mather MP Phone Mail Phone keir.mather.mp@parliament.uk ​​ 01757 247 990 ​ 16 Park Street, Selby, YO8 4PW Home About Selby and Kippax North Yorkshire Council Leeds City Council Seeking support Local Campaigns SEND provision Road safety Improving mobile signal Tackling flooding Better buses Progress in Parliament Key Policy Statements News Contact Privacy Policy Standards Contact If you're a resident of the Selby and Kippax constituency and are in need of support, have any concerns about our local area or thoughts on policy issues, please do get in touch with me. ​ ​ Email: ​ keir.mather.mp@parliament.uk ​ Telephone: ​ 01757 247 990 ​ Constituency Address: The Office of Keir Mather MP 16 Park Street, Selby, YO8 4PW ​ Westminster Address: ​ Keir Mather MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA ​​ In all correspondence, please ensure you provide your full name, residential address and any contact number; strict parliamentary protocol means I can only reply to constituents of Selby and Kippax. ​ Mail Home Location Camera Phone Stay updated on my work in the constituency and beyond Sign up for my newsletter © 2025 by Keir Mather MP. All rights reserved. Promoted by Keir Mather MP of 16 Park Street, Selby, YO8 4PW bottom of page
